customerId.description: The ID of the customer. If applicable to the app event.

appInstallationId.description: The ID of the app installation. If applicable to the app event.

transactionId.description: The ID of the transaction. If applicable to the app event.

previousSubscriptionId.description: The ID of the previous subscription. If applicable to the app event.

subscriptionId.description: The ID of the subscription. If applicable to the app event.

occurredAt.description: The date and time the app event occurred.

createdAt.description: The date and time the app event was created in Mantle.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the app event was last updated. Events are not usually updated.
